statement: Every material UI, README, and demo claim resolves to a stable redacted artifact or deterministic assertion.
A v1 run bundle contains manifest, WorkItem, world, cold outcome/trace/verification, memory proposal/admission, warm outcome/trace/verification, scorecard, and a human-readable index.
Evidence covers relevant-applied, proposal-only, admission-rejected, irrelevant-applied, and wrong-scope-applied cases with exact attribution and reason codes.
The manifest identifies run ID, UTC time, source commit, canonical input digest, schema and prompt versions, exact model ID, GraphReFly version, and artifact hashes.
Commit reviewed redacted fixtures; keep raw provider responses under an ignored raw directory; preserve a replay path that requires no API key.
Never commit API keys, credentials, billing details, unredacted sensitive user content, private submission data, or large raw captures.
Each milestone records its demonstrated claim, command or user path, gate output, commit SHA, artifact paths, known limitations, and follow-up.
